creator: bramterborch@gmail.com
text:
hping3 fails to work.

installed hping3 via:
pkg install hping-devel-3.0.20051105_2


root@x:~ # hping3 10.10.10.20
HPING 10.10.10.20 (ixl0 10.10.10.20): NO FLAGS are set, 40 headers + 0 data bytes
[send_ip] sendto: Invalid argument

sendto(3,"E\0(\0\M-Y\M-0\0\0@\^F\0\0\n\n\n"...,40,0x0,{ AF_INET 10.10.10.20:11111 },0x10) ERR#22 'Invalid argument'
